raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I called XXXX travel rewards XXXX XXXX from Barclays at XXXX to report an unauthorized transfer of {$2000.00} and a transfer fee of {$100.00} on my my abovementioned card ended XXXX. The customer services lady said will take that away, asked me to destroy the old card and she will issue me a new car. And she gave me a confirmation number XXXX. A week after I received a new card ended XXXX. On XXXX I received a letter from Barclays saying is investing the fraud but I will not be responsible for it. Since nothing happened because Barclays kept sending notice asking for payment on that reported fraud amount. I then sent another letter to them asking them to take care of the matter and wait. Until I saw a withdrawal of {$500.00} taken out from my XXXX  without my permission to pay for that fraud claim, I gave them a call at XXXX on XXXX and spoke to XXXX a customer services who said she saw my report but didn't see any action and she transferred me to the fraud department, a XXXX XXXX with me and said will take care of that right away and will credit back the {$500.00}. Until today, 4 days after nothing happened. Please give me your hand on this unscrupulous and irresponsible action on this credit company. Thank you very much. XXXX bless. XXXX XXXX.
